name: CRYPTO - Binance Historical Data to Supabase

nodes.name: Fetch Klines from Binance
nodes.notes: Binance public endpoint - no authentication required

nodes.name: Save to Supabase
nodes.notes: Setup: Add your Supabase credentials in n8n before running

meta.description: Fetches 2 years of daily OHLCV data from Binance for 10 major crypto pairs and stores them in Supabase. No API key required (public endpoint).
